---
title: 'Knowledge Base Doc Types'
description: 'All 14 standard AID Knowledge Base document types — what each captures and where its template lives.'

<!-- generated — do not edit; source: canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/*.md -->

The Knowledge Base is the gravitational center of AID — every phase reads it, any phase can revise it. `aid-discover` populates these **14 standard documents** under `.aid/knowledge/` (plus three meta-documents: `INDEX.md`, `README.md`, and `STATE.md`). The set is the default seed and is configurable per project via `discovery.doc_set` in `.aid/settings.yml`. Each row links to the template the document is generated from.

| Doc Type | Title | Source |
|----------|-------|--------|
| `architecture` | Architecture | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/architecture.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/architecture.md) |
| `coding-standards` | Coding Standards | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/coding-standards.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/coding-standards.md) |
| `domain-glossary` | Domain Glossary | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/domain-glossary.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/domain-glossary.md) |
| `external-sources` | External Sources | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/external-sources.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/external-sources.md) |
| `feature-inventory` | Feature Inventory | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/feature-inventory.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/feature-inventory.md) |
| `infrastructure` | Infrastructure | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/infrastructure.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/infrastructure.md) |
| `integration-map` | Integration Map | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/integration-map.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/integration-map.md) |
| `module-map` | Module Map | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/module-map.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/module-map.md) |
| `pipeline-contracts` | API Contracts | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/pipeline-contracts.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/pipeline-contracts.md) |
| `project-structure` | Project Structure | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/project-structure.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/project-structure.md) |
| `schemas` | Data Model | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/schemas.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/schemas.md) |
| `tech-debt` | Tech Debt | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/tech-debt.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/tech-debt.md) |
| `technology-stack` | Technology Stack | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/technology-stack.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/technology-stack.md) |
| `test-landscape` | Test Landscape | [`canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/test-landscape.md`](https://github.com/AndreVianna/aid-methodology/blob/master/canonical/aid/templates/knowledge-base/test-landscape.md) |
